title: lycopus ramosissimus var. japonicus
intro: Lycopus ramosissimus var. japonicus, also known as Japanese water hawthorn, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lycopus ramosissimus var. japonicus include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing the throat. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
